title: Kaths Skillsystem
description: [Multiplayer Capable]  A Skillsystem which improving overall stats, giving perma buffs and adds a little bit of magic.
body:
| Bugs&News | All Projects | |-|-| | | | |[Direct link](https://discord.gg/vGY3PePuVd)|[Direct link](https://modrinth.com/user/Kathezel)| --- # What does it do/add? This Datapack implements a simple, balanced and big skillsystem which is using your EXP to convert it into skillpoints which you then can use to level many different skill like Attributes buff, perma Effects, Magic and Summons and much more. --- # What does it do? This datapack implements a rather big and simple but not too overpowered skillsystem which is using your EXP to convert it into skillpoints which you then can use to skill **into 50+ different Skills.** **Complimentary datpack: https://modrinth.com/datapack/kaths-simple-bossmobs**
Skillpoints - The amount of EXP needed increases by 100 EXP every skillpoint. - Max EXP use is 2000EXP ~35lvl per skillpoint. - You will lose all skillpoints and skills after you die. - Eat a enchanted or normal golden apple to save your skills - *or* use the command provided in the *usefull commnds* tab
Stats Points System If the player got enough points in one catagory, the player will gain a Skillpoints. The amount needed für the next skillpoint is higher after each Skillpoint. - Building block will give the player minus points for that block to not exploit the system - 1 Minus point will get removed after 60 minuts
Mob Points - Killing "enemy" mobs will grand the player **Killpoints.** - All mobs give thier own amount of point after being killed. - More difficult enemies grand more points. 1 skillp. = 50 points 1-4 skillp. +50 Points 5-9 skillp. +500 Points 10+ skillp. +1000 Points
Mining Points - Mining ore will grand Mining Points - Each ore has its own point value 1 skillp. = 50 Points 1-4 skillp. +50 Points 5-9 skillp. +500 Points 10+ skillp. +1000 Points
Woodcutting Points - Cutting wood will grand woodcutting points - Each wood type has its own point value 1 skillp. = 50 Points 1-4 skillp. +50 Points 5-9 skillp. +100 Points 10+ skillp. +300 Points
Trading Points - Trading with an villiger will give the player 1 Point for each trade 1 skillp. = 20 Points 1-4 skillp. +30 Points 5-9 skillp. +500 Points 10+ skillp. +1000 Points
Skillbook structure **More pictures found her: [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/kaths-skillsystem/gallery)** ![Skillbook structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B8bh5HHu/images/84c9ce1056dac0ae9a638ab057ccb2734a7c7665.png)
All Skills

Coss-/Bow |Skill|Cost|Max lvl|Max cost|Category| |-|-|-|-|-| |Damamge|1|10|10|Defence| |Piercing|1|10|10|Utilities| |Fire arrows|2|1|2|Utilities| |Crit arrows|5|1|5|Utilities|

Summons **Summons:** |Skill|Cost|Max lvl|Category| |-|-|-|-| |Allay|3|1|Summons| |Bat|3|1|Summons| |Bee|3|1|Summons| |Parrot|3|1|Summons| |Vex|3|1|Summons| **Abilities:** |Skill|Cost|Max lvl|Category| |-|-|-|-| |Attacking|5|1|Summon skills| |Feeding|3|1|Summon skills| |Lighting|3|1|Summon skills| **Attack stats:** |Skill|Cost|Max lvl|Category| |-|-|-|-| |Damage|1|10|Summon skills| |Range|1|5|Summon skills| |Speed|1|9|Summon skills|
Useful Commands: Options: **Main Menu:** - Uninstall datapack. - reset Datapack - Toggle death penalty. - Toggle normal golden apple save skills. - Toggle Magic Skill PvP. **Custom XP/Points:** - Change how much more XP is needed for the next skillpoint - range: 0 - Infinite - Change after how many skillpoints the needed XP caps - range: 1 - Infinite **Give items & points:** - Give all or specific items from the datapack. - Give yourself or all 1,10,100 or 1000 Skillpoints ### picture will not get updated for new options! - Gives the player the option stick to see the optionmenu. - /function k_skills:options/menu ![Optionmenu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B8bh5HHu/images/71b33c0f1352a4fc0d69ac92ffd78591db373915.png)
# What does it add? It adds 3 new items - Skillbook = Which let you use the skillsystem - Skill reset = With this item you can reset your skill and regain and re-assign any used points - Revokeness shard = Gives you your EXP back as long you have an unused skillpoint. Using the skillreset and revokeness shard is by holding these items in the offhand and the Skillbook in the mainhand New Advancements with infos about the datapack and many new goals # How to start. New players will automaticly get the skillbook or after the first time joining. Also at the start, the player will get a chat message with a small tutorial and help to the pack. _Can always be reopened via the '[?]' on the first page of the skillbook._
Crafting Recipes: ![Skillbook Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B8bh5HHu/images/a0272f1c0e6ee200615a414c73b015173b1cd581.png) ![Skill reset Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B8bh5HHu/images/fb2f4f6852dc35cce1336d51c9b888d7d3bd5b22.png) ![Revokeness shard Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B8bh5HHu/images/ae515ff9f7ca288d63b2a33f85735680ab430c13.png)
Then you need to get skillpoints. by hovering over the book in the inventory you can see how much EXP you need to get the next skillpoint. Or killing a few mobs will also grand a skillpoint. Open the book and the first page is all about skillpoints. Click on [+ skillpoint] to add one. Now you have a skillpoint you can use to lvl any skill. but remember, better skills need more skillpoints. read the tooltips of the skills by hovering over the skillname. # Note for content creators: I'm interested in seeing people playing and/or giving feedback on my Datapacks. So if you are creating a video of any kind with or about my datapacks, I would be really happy to get notified on my discord about it, so I can see your feedback. Also if you allow me to, I would put it on the Modrinth page, so others can see a first impression. **This is not necessary, you don't have to!**
